name: White Christmas Pie- Dkp
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water and set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup flour, and 1/2 tsp salt. Gradually add milk, stirring until blended. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in softened gelatin and flavorings. Cool.
3. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) and cream of tartar until foamy. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until soft peaks form. Fold the egg whites, whipped cream, and 1 cup coconut into the gelatin mixture. Pour into the crust.
4. Sprinkle with additional coconut if desired. Chill until set.
5. Garnish with candied cherries.
Note: Made this one Christmas and received rave reviews. Very pretty pie.
